videos.title: James Webb Found Planet We Could Live On - Then Things Got Weird
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description:
The James Webb Space Telescope has discovered an intriguing Earth-like planet located relatively close to our cosmic neighborhood.

videos.title: Jupiter Turns Out to Have More Oxygen Than Scientists Thought
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Scientists have discovered that Jupiter contains significantly more oxygen than previously believed, a finding that could reshape our understanding of how the Solar System's largest planet formed. By analyzing data from deep within Jupiter's atmosphere and interior, researchers are uncovering clues

videos.title: Europe Is Slowly Breaking Apart, Geologists Say
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: The Iberian Peninsula, home to Spain and Portugal, is actually performing a massive, glacially slow clockwise rotation beneath Europe. videos.title: Scientists Move the South Pole Every Year, Here's Why
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: The Geographic South Pole isn't a permanent spot on the map—it actually sits on a massive ice sheet that drifts roughly 33 feet every single year. videos.title: Archaeologists Discovered a 5,000-Year-Old Sunken Island
videos.author: BRIGHT SIDE
videos.description: Archaeologists in England have uncovered evidence of a remarkable prehistoric island that was built by humans around 5,000 years ago before later becoming submerged beneath the water.
